title: Week 11 - Sorting Algorithms II and Applications
description: Practice inserting a value into a sorted array.

questions.title: Insert a New Score into a Sorted List

description.statement: Return a new sorted array after inserting newScore into an already sorted array.
description.input: A sorted array table and one new score.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(scores, newScore)
    local result = {}
    local index = 1
    local inserted = false
    for i = 1, #scores do
        if not inserted and newScore < scores[i] then
            result[index] = newScore
            index = index + 1
            inserted = true
        end
        result[index] = scores[i]
        index = index + 1
    end
    if not inserted then
        result[index] = newScore
    end
    return result
end
